title: Section 42
content: Whoever breaks any rule made or continued under this Act, not being a rule made by the 1[High Court], shall, on conviction before a Magistrate; be punishable with fine which may extend to fifty rupees, or with imprisonment for a term which may extend to six months, or with both.
footnote: 1. Subs. by the A.O. 1950 for "Chief Court".
